author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Delivered:
1. GPU parallel reduction kernel (reduce_sum_kernel) — tree reduction with shared memory, grid-stride accumulation, 256 threads/block. Two-pass: first pass produces partial sums, second pass reduces to scalar.
2. gpu_reduce_sum() function with CPU fallback
3. sum_f32 backend now uses GPU kernel instead of downloading entire tensor to CPU
4. mean() now uses GPU sum + scalar multiply instead of CPU round-trip
5. sum_dim() now dispatches to GPU sum_axis_f32 kernel when tensor is CUDA f32
6. CPU path also fixed for non-contiguous tensors (calls contiguous())
7. 807 core + 193 gpu + 6 integration tests pass
